productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girls White Top
description: Composition White round neck top made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and embroidered branding on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Use mild detergents Do not tumble dry Do not iron on embellishments Use warm iron Remove all detachable accessories before washing or ironing gini and jony's palm tree line have come up with this pretty top for the apple of your eye! girls will love to dress up in this comfy cotton top and a pair of jeans or a skirt.
